<?php namespace App\Http\Controllers\Auth; use App\Http\Controllers\Controller; use Illuminate\Http\JsonResponse; use Illuminate\Http\RedirectResponse; use Illuminate\Http\Request; class EmailVerificationNotificationController extends Controller { /** * Send a new email verification notification. */ public function store(Request $request): JsonResponse|RedirectResponse { if ($request->user()->hasVerifiedEmail()) { return redirect()->intended('/dashboard'); } $request->user()->sendEmailVerificationNotification(); return response()->json(['status' => 'verification-link-sent']); } }
